ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date of the weather record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location ID where the weather data was collected */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded for the day (in °C) */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded for the day (in °C) */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Total rainfall recorded for the day (in mm) */,
  "evaporation" REAL /* Total evaporation for the day (in mm) */,
  "sunshine" REAL /* Total sunshine hours recorded for the day */,
  "wind_gust_dir" TEXT /* Wind gust direction at its highest speed */,
  "wind_gust_speed" REAL /* Wind gust speed recorded (in km/h) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity recorded for the day (in %) */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Average atmospheric pressure recorded for the day (in hPa) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover recorded for the day */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Average visibility recorded for the day (in km) */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Average wind direction recorded for the day */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed recorded for the day (in km/h) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_records_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location where weather data is recorded */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location (in meters) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "nearest_city" TEXT /* Nearest major city to the location */,
  "distance_to_nearest_city" REAL /* Distance to the nearest major city (in km) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_records ("record_id")
)
